## Epic

Product Surfaces

## Description

- Create marketing/home page with value proposition
- Add sections: Overview, Features, Strategies, Security
- Add clear CTAs: Connect Wallet, Open Dashboard, Learn More
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Palette: Primary #0EA5E9; Accent #10B981; Warning #F59E0B; Danger #EF4444
  - Backgrounds: Page #0B1220; Surface #111827; Border #1F2937
  - Text: Primary #F8FAFC; Muted #94A3B8
  - Typography: Inter (400/500/600/700); numeric text may use Roboto Mono; sizes 14/16/20/24/30/36 with line-height 1.4–1.6
  - Spacing scale: 8/12/16/24/32
  - Controls: Buttons radius 8px (primary filled, secondary outline)
  - Cards: 1px border (#1F2937), shadow (0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.2)), radius 12px

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Fully responsive landing page
- [ ] SEO metadata added
- [ ] Lighthouse performance baseline captured
- [ ] CTA links wired
- [ ] Follows the issue-level design spec (palette, typography, spacing)
- [ ] PR includes full-page screenshots (mobile + desktop, light/dark)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `landing-page`, `priority-medium`
